title: Here are the six Indian law firms selected to advise on NSE IPO
description: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas (CAM), Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas (SAM), AZB & Partners, Khaitan & Co, Trilegal and S&R Associates are among the law firms selected to advise on the proposed Initial Public Offering (IPO) of the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE). The exchange on Thursday announced that it has concluded the process of selecting merchant bankers, law firms and other intermediaries for the proposed listing. The selection was carried out through a competitive process appro
